Job Title: Frontend Engineer (Headless Ecommerce)
Location: Sam Yan, Bangkok – Full-time onsite
Open to Thai and international candidates




Introduction
We are a Danish company with a growing team in Bangkok, building modern B2B ecommerce solutions on a headless architecture.

This role focuses on owning the frontend experience of our ecommerce platform. You will work closely with backend specialists to build a high-performance, type-safe shopping ecosystem using a modern stack.

You are expected to take ownership of your work within your area, while continuing to grow your technical and architectural understanding over time.

 

What You Will Work On

Ecommerce Engineering

Build and scale modern, type-safe storefronts using TanStack Start

Content Management

Design and implement the content layer using Strapi to bridge marketing and commerce

System Integration

Collaborate with our Vendure backend team to ensure seamless API integration and state management

Established Portfolio

Manage and optimize our existing portfolio of standalone WordPress client projects, ensuring they remain fast and stable

 

A Note on the Stack
We use TanStack Start. If you have not used it yet but are experienced with Next.js, Nuxt.js, or Remix, you will be able to onboard quickly. Developers with a solid Node.js framework background typically become productive fast in our setup.

 

What You Will NOT Do

Work on low-impact tasks without ownership

Follow rigid specifications without understanding the system

Deliver copy-paste solutions without context

 

Who You Are

Must-have

3–5 years of experience working with modern frontend frameworks (e.g. Next.js, Nuxt.js, Remix or similar)

Solid understanding of Node.js-based frameworks

Ability to debug production issues manually

Strong understanding of how systems work, not just isolated components

Ability to explain your work and technical decisions clearly

Experience working on real-world, production-scale applications

Comfortable using AI tools (Gemini/Claude/chatGPT) as support, not as a dependency

Strong problem-solving skills and ability to identify root causes

Nice-to-have

Previous experience with Vendure or high-end Headless Commerce

Deep understanding of TypeScript and the TanStack ecosystem (Query/Router)

Familiarity with PostgreSQL or custom Strapi plugin development

 

How You Will Work

You will be expected to take ownership of your work after onboarding and operate with a good level of independence.

We work in a structured setup with clear responsibilities, where engineers are trusted to contribute, take initiative, and improve solutions over time. You will collaborate closely with backend specialists and take part in technical discussions and system design.

This role requires both solid execution and a willingness to grow into a more senior level of responsibility.

 

What We Offer

4½-day work week

23 paid vacation days

3 Personal Business Leave days

+5 bonus leave days after 12 months

Thai Social Security

Lunch allowance after onboarding

Office with direct MRT access (Sam Yan)

Work Permit & Visa Sponsorship (if relevant)

Company laptop & equipment

Hybrid flexibility after onboarding

International setup (Denmark + Bangkok)

Nordic-inspired work culture (clarity, trust, responsibility)

 

About Us

We are a Danish company building and operating digital solutions for international clients. Our Bangkok office is a core part of our setup, where we combine a modern engineering environment with a structured and professional way of working.

We focus on quality, ownership, and long-term collaboration.

Job_Title: Service Support Engineer (Mobile & Banking Applications) - Tier 3 - Nimble
Company: Bank of Ayudhya Public Company Limited
Full_Description:
Job Description

The Service Support Engineer (Tier 3) provides advanced technical support for the bank’s

core digital platforms, including Mobile Banking and Internal Web Applications. This role

acts as a critical escalation point for resolving complex system issues across Windows,

Linux, and Cloud environments (AWS/Azure). You will be responsible for ensuring the

24/7 availability of banking services, managing critical Job Scheduling operations, and

collaborating with Developers to maintain the integrity of the bank’s digital infrastructure.

Key Responsibilities:

Banking Application Support: Provide Tier 3 support for Mobile Banking

(iOS/Android) and Internal Web Applications. Monitor system performance,

identify bugs, and troubleshoot application-level errors.

Job Scheduling & Operations: Oversee and execute critical banking tasks via

Windows Task Scheduler and Linux Crontab. Ensure all scheduled jobs (e.g., end of-day processing, data synchronization) run accurately and on time.

Cloud & Infrastructure Monitoring: Maintain the health and security of services on

AWS (EC2, S3) or Azure (VM, Storage). Manage IAM roles and assist in secure

software deployments and system patching.

Advanced Troubleshooting: Analyze complex issues related to System Logs,

Database Connections, and Network Latency that a.ect banking transactions.

Perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA) in collaboration with Developer and Security

teams.

Automation & Scripting: Develop and maintain PowerShell, Bash, or Python

scripts to automate routine banking operations and backup processes to minimize

human error.

Documentation: Create and update Knowledge Base entries and Troubleshooting

Guides to ensure compliance with banking audit standards.

Troubleshoot and analyze issues, including mobile application (iOS/Android),

across UAT and PVT environments to ensure successful golive- readiness.




Job Qualifications

Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Engineering, IT, Computer Science, or a

related field.

Experience: 3 years up of experience in IT Support, System Administration, or

Banking Operations. Interest in Mobile App Support and Cloud Infrastructure is

essential.

Technical Proficiency:

Foundational knowledge of Windows Server, Linux CLI, and Web

Application architecture.

Understanding of Mobile Banking systems and how APIs/Web Services

interact with the backend.

Familiarity with Job Scheduling logic (Cron jobs/Task Scheduler).

Basic understanding of Cloud Computing (Certifications like AWS Cloud

Practitioner or Azure Fundamentals are a plus).

Ability to write basic scripts (PowerShell, Python, or Bash) and basic SQL

queries for data investigation.

Advanced Diagnostics: Proficient in using tcpdump and Wireshark for

packet-level analysis to trace API flows and resolve complex integration

issues between internal systems and third-party partners.

Network Fundamentals: Strong grasp of TCP/IP, DNS, and SSL/TLS

protocols, essential for debugging connectivity and authentication (OAuth2)

issues in production environments.

API Observability: Skilled in analyzing network tra.ic to identify latency

bottlenecks and transmission errors that application logs might miss.

Experience building automation tools or workflow automations using

Microsoft Power Automate, n8n , or Copilot Studio is a plus.

Good communication skills and ability to manage cross-functional tasks.

Demonstrate strong analytical and technical troubleshooting skills,

including the ability to analyze logs, trace API flows, and resolve mobile

(iOS/Android) issue

Job_Title: Consulting, Business Analyst (Core Banking) - Senior to Manager
Full_Description:
Business Analyst (Core Banking) - Senior to Manager 

We are hiring a Senior Business Analyst at CXO to provide strategic, functional, and delivery‑focused leadership for large‑scale core banking implementations. The role blends executive engagement with hands‑on business analysis to drive requirements definition, solution design, vendor alignment, and successful program delivery across complex, multi‑stakeholder retail banking transformations.

Key Responsibilities:

Executive Engagement

Act as the senior business representative to executive sponsors and steering committees.
Translate business strategy into clear program objectives and measurable outcomes.

Strategic Business Analysis

Lead the definition, prioritization, and validation of business capabilities, end‑to‑end processes, and target operating models.
Support core banking modernization initiatives, including cloud‑enabled and API‑first architectures.

Solution & Functional Design

Decompose complex requirements into implementable scope across CASA, deposits, lending, payments, and adjacent modules.

Program Support & Governance

Advise program leadership on governance, risks, dependencies, and release sequencing.
Ensure requirements traceability, clear acceptance criteria, and go/no‑go readiness.

Stakeholder & Vendor Management

Serve as the primary liaison between business units (Retail, SME, Commercial), technology teams, and external vendors.
Drive scope alignment, prioritization, and adherence to SLAs. 

Delivery Enablement

Coach and mentor business analysis and cross‑functional teams.
Ensure adherence to delivery methodologies (Agile and/or Waterfall), quality standards, and performance metrics.

Go‑to‑Market & Advisory Support

Contribute to go‑to‑market positioning and support pre‑sales or advisory activities where required.

Required Experience & Skills:

Thai native / Thai speaking only

Seniority & Experience

CXO or CXO‑1 level with up to 15+ years’ experience in banking or financial services.
Minimum 5 years leading core banking transformation programs (consulting firm or large bank).

Domain Expertise

Deep knowledge of core banking modules including CASA, deposits, lending, and payments.
Strong understanding of retail banking processes and regulatory/reporting implications. 

Technical Fluency

Solid understanding of API integrations, cloud‑native banking platforms, and data models.
Proficiency in SQL for data analysis and validation. 

Delivery Experience

Proven track record delivering large‑scale core banking implementations and migrations.
Experience working with both Agile/Scrum and Waterfall delivery approaches.

Leadership & Communication

Strong executive presence with the ability to influence senior stakeholders.
Excellent facilitation, negotiation, and communication skills.
Ability to translate strategy into clear, actionable requirements. 

Problem Solving

Demonstrated ability to break down complex problems, design pragmatic solutions, and drive decisions to closure.

Nice to Have

Prior experience with major core banking platforms and vendors (specific systems can be listed if required).
Experience leading multi‑region transformation programs and transformation offices.

Key responsibilities and Activities

ABOUT VIDERE

Videre is an award-winning, UK-registered NGO that exposes human rights abuses and holds perpetrators to account. We work directly with communities in stressed environments, equipping networks of activists and community leaders with the technology and training necessary to safely capture visual documentation of political violence, human rights violations, and other systemic abuses. Our aim is to ensure that the concerns and knowledge of affected communities drive advocacy, policy, and legal action. We currently have teams and partners in six countries and support staff in three further countries.

ABOUT THE ROLE

Videre is seeking an Investigations Lead, responsible for leading the delivery of impactful, high quality human rights investigations across the organisation.

The role combines substantive leadership on investigative content with operational oversight, ensuring that investigations are methodologically sound, ethically robust, and safely implemented.

Listening to project staff and community investigators, and working in close partnership with other technical leads (including programming, legal, impact and security management colleagues), the Investigation Lead shapes investigative priorities and approaches while ensuring that investigation teams—both project staff and community-based investigators—have the tools, skills, guidance, and support required to carry out complex human rights investigations in high-risk contexts.

The Investigations Lead line-manages an OSINT Researcher and four project staff who, in turn, manage and support community investigators.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Investigation Strategy and Leadership

Listen to project staff and community investigators, and alongside Videre’s Knowledge Management Team, lead the design and oversight of Videre’s investigations.
Lead the delivery of human rights investigations in line with organisational priorities and ethical standards.
Shape investigative content, scope, and methodology in collaboration with internal technical experts.
Ensure investigations are grounded in robust legal, factual, and contextual analysis.
Contribute to organisational strategy by identifying emerging investigative priorities and risks.

Methodology, Quality, and Ethics

Develop, adapt, and oversee investigative methodologies, tools, and protocols.
Ensure compliance with ethical standards, including do no harm, impartiality, and inclusivity.
Oversee quality assurance processes to ensure accuracy, consistency, and credibility of findings; this includes leading on Videre’s verification processes to ensure they remain robust.
Support teams to navigate complex ethical and methodological dilemmas.

Operational Oversight and Safety

Ensure investigation teams are equipped to operate safely in conflict-affected and high-risk environments.
Work with Videre’s Security Manager to integrate risk assessment and mitigation into investigation planning.
Ensure appropriate data protection, information security, and documentation practices are in place.
Support decision-making around when to adapt, pause, or stop investigations due to risk.

Capacity Building and Support

Ensure investigation teams have access to appropriate training, guidance, and ongoing technical support; you will be expected to deliver training to our project teams and, as needed, to our CSO partners.
Strengthen the capacity of project staff to manage and support community investigators effectively.
Promote reflective practice, learning, and continuous improvement within investigation teams.

Line Management and Leadership

Line-manage the OSINT Researcher and project staff executing investigations, providing clear direction, support, and accountability.
Support project staff to supervise community investigators in a way that prioritises safety, wellbeing, and ethical practice.
Foster a collaborative, inclusive, and learning-oriented team culture.

Impact

Work closely with programming, impact, media and legal colleagues to ensure investigations are ‘distribution ready’ and data collected generates maximum impact.

Demonstrated commitment to survivor-centred, ethical, and inclusive approaches, leading with care, humility, and respect for affected communities.

Fluency in both English and French

Preferred

Experience working with community-based investigators or local partners.

Experience working across multidisciplinary teams.

Are you prepared to join the Product team at 12Go and help us build the leading online travel platform, providing seamless booking experiences for travelers worldwide? 

12Go, being a part of Travelier group, offers a wide range of transportation options, including trains, buses, ferries, and flights, to help customers travel conveniently and affordably. Our vision is to enable any customer to instantly book any route in the world.

What is Product Team at 12Go?

Data-driven and curious: We thrive on insights, ask the tough questions, and let data guide us to the best solutions.
Collaboration at our core: We believe the best ideas come from working together, valuing every voice on the team.
Customer-first mindset: Everything we build starts with understanding and improving the customer experience.
Experimentation enthusiasts: We love testing, learning, and iterating quickly to keep pushing boundaries.
Fun and dynamic: We’re serious about results but don’t take ourselves too seriously—bringing energy and humor to everything we do.
Always evolving: Whether it's our products or ourselves, we’re all about growth, innovation, and continuous improvement.

Join us in crafting this exciting journey, where your contribution will be key to our success!

Responsibilities

Define product vision & strategy: Understand customer needs, market trends, and business goals to set clear product direction. Identify and own big pricing & revenue bets: Lead org-wide initiatives that reshape how we monetize the platform
Own the pricing, promotion and revenue product roadmap: Prioritize features, enhancements, and technical improvements based on impact, effort, and alignment with company strategy. Developing and implementing pricing strategies that enhance profitability
Lead cross-functional collaboration: Work closely with engineering, design, marketing, operations, and data teams to deliver high-quality products on time.
Drive execution: Translate product ideas into clear requirements and user stories, and manage delivery through agile development cycles. Assist in creating promotional campaigns, and conducting pricing optimization and cost-benefit analysis
Measure success: Define KPIs, track performance, and iterate on the product based on quantitative data and qualitative feedback.
Customer obsession: Advocate for users by conducting user research, usability testing, and feedback analysis to ensure the best customer experience.
Stakeholder management: Communicate product plans, progress, and performance to leadership and key stakeholders. Collaborating with product, marketing, and finance teams on pricing decisions
Champion experimentation and A/B testing as a driver of growth and decision-making

Requirements

Advanced level of English.
Proven experience (3+ years) as a Product Manager or Senior Product Manager.
Strong background in pricing, promotion and/or revenue management.
Pricing Expertise: You’ve designed successful pricing strategies for other products and can show results.
Ability to define and deliver strategic roadmaps with measurable business impact.
Solid analytical skills; confident working with SQL or similar tools to deep dive into data.
Self-organized, with strong prioritization and time management.
Excellent problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills.

Nice to Have

Experience in OTA / e-commerce platforms.
Exposure to international markets or localization.

Benefits

Engaging work on a product that enables millions of travelers to book their trips daily;
Full-time remote working - 5 days week, 8 hours per day;
Development opportunities (budget for self-paced learning, global training workshops, online English language classes, e-learning platforms);
Internal growth and internal mobility opportunities;
Competitive annual leave, sick leave, and public holidays;
Annual company offsite in Thailand;
High-growth start up international environment.

• ​มีความรู้เรื่องการทำ AI Agent หรือ Automation (Make.com, Zapier)

• ​ทำงานในบรรยากาศทันสมัย ยืดหยุ่น และเปิดรับไอเดียใหม่ๆ

ถ้าคุณเบื่องานรูทีนที่ต้องทำซ้ำๆ แบบเดิมทุกวัน... ที่นี่คือที่ของคุณ!"




​เราไม่ได้มองหาแค่พนักงาน แต่เรามองหา "พ่วงตำแหน่ง AI Pioneer" ที่จะเข้ามาวางระบบและเติบโตไปพร้อมกับแบรนด์

• ​ให้อิสระทางความคิด: มีไอเดียอะไรใหม่ๆ มี Tool เจ๋งๆ อยากลอง เราซัพพอร์ตค่า Subscription ให้เต็มที่

• ​สร้าง Impact จริง: ผลงานของคุณจะถูกนำไปใช้ในกระบวนการทำงานจริง

Job_Title: Data Center Technician - Thailand - Ban Chang - On-site
Full_Description:
Reboot Monkey is a global leader in IT solutions, specializing in data center management that simplifies your IT operations. We provide hosting space, future-proof upgrades, and 24/7 support through our smart or remote hands, ensuring seamless, secure, and sustainable service. Our fully remote, round-the-clock management frees businesses from supervision hassles, setting new benchmarks in data center solutions. We’re seeking skilled Freelance Data Center Technicians to join our growing team. If you have expertise in data center operations and want flexible work, we’d love to hear from you.


Job Overview:

As a Freelance Data Center Technician, you will play a key role in delivering on-demand support to our global data centers. Your responsibilities will include hardware installation, troubleshooting complex issues, and managing network operations, ensuring optimal performance and reliability. We’re looking for someone with deep expertise in data center equipment and software who can work independently while collaborating with remote teams. In this role, you’ll be essential to maintaining smooth, secure, and efficient data center operations, contributing to our high standards of service excellence.

Key Responsibilities:

Install, configure, and maintain servers, networking equipment, and other hardware to ensure optimal performance and maximum uptime, facilitating seamless operations within the data center.


Monitor data center operations both remotely and on-site, quickly diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and connectivity issues to minimize downtime and maintain service reliability.

Configure, manage, and troubleshoot networking devices, including Cisco and Juniper routers, switches, and firewalls, to ensure secure and efficient network operations that align with organizational standards.

Manage and troubleshoot both Linux and Windows-based systems, performing essential updates, patches, and security enhancements to keep systems secure and up-to-date.

Document all installations, repairs, maintenance tasks, and system performance, providing comprehensive reports to the remote management team to ensure transparency and accountability in operations.

Implement and maintain security protocols to protect the integrity of the data center infrastructure, ensuring compliance with industry standards and best practices for data security.

Collaborate with remote IT teams, vendors, and stakeholders to enhance data center operations, actively participating in the planning and execution of projects that drive efficiency and innovation.

What We Offer:

Flexibility: Work around your existing freelance or permanent job. You choose the tickets you want to pick up, with no minimum hour commitment.

Professional Environment: Join a professional work environment where you can reconnect with the practical side of IT.

Competitive Compensation: We offer competitive rewards for your compensation and efforts.

Growth Opportunities: Work with compelling clients and seize opportunities to grow in your field.

Education:

Associate or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field is preferred but not required.

Experience:

3+ years of experience in data center operations, with a strong focus on independent or freelance projects.

Technical Skills:

Extensive hands-on experience with Cisco and Juniper networking devices.

Strong proficiency in managing and troubleshooting Windows and Linux-based systems.

Solid understanding of networking principles (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, VLANs).

Experience with virtualization technologies such as VMware or Hyper-V is a plus.

Certifications:

Valid certifications like Cisco CCNA/CCNP, Juniper JNCIA/JNCIS, or CompTIA Linux+ are highly desirable.

General Requirements:

Ability to travel to various data center locations on short notice.

Flexibility to work outside regular hours, including nights and weekends if required.

Must have access to necessary tools and equipment to perform data center tasks.

Strong problem-solving skills, with the ability to work independently and remotely.

Excellent communication skills for collaboration with remote teams.

Full_Description:
About the Role


Join our team as a Data Center Technician in Saraburi, Thailand. This is a full-time, on-site position where you'll support critical infrastructure at world-class data center facilities.

฿450,000-640,000/year (THB annual)

Health, dental, and vision insurance

Paid time off and holidays

Professional development allowance

Certification sponsorship

Work Schedule


Full-time permanent position

Standard business hours with on-call rotation

Shift differentials for nights/weekends when applicable

Key Responsibilities


Install, configure, and maintain server and network equipment

Perform structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)

Execute hardware deployments and decommissions

Monitor environmental systems (power, cooling, security)

Respond to incidents and perform troubleshooting

Maintain accurate documentation and asset tracking

Collaborate with engineering and operations teams

Participate in capacity planning and upgrades

3+ years data center operations experience

Expert cabling skills (Cat6/6a, OM3/OM4/OS2 fiber)

Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities

Experience with rack and stack operations

Understanding of power distribution and UPS systems

Excellent documentation and communication skills

Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in demanding environments

Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, CDCE) - preferred

Vendor certifications (Dell, HPE, Cisco) - preferred

Network certifications (CCNA, JNCIA) - preferred

Experience with DCIM platforms - preferred

Knowledge of ITIL practices - preferred

Work Type: Full-time
Positions Available: 1
Work Days: Monday – Friday
Days Off: Saturday, Sunday
Working Hours: 08:00 – 17:00


Responsibilities

Analyze and evaluate the organization’s information system needs, workflow, and data flow to identify gaps and improvement opportunities.

Design and develop information systems based on business requirements, define system specifications, and coordinate system procurement or development with relevant teams.

Collaborate with stakeholders—including executives, business units, and development teams—to translate business needs into technical requirements.

Oversee and manage IT projects, including system development, testing, and implementation.

Analyze and design IT infrastructure such as network systems, data centers, and information security.

Research and stay updated on emerging technologies to enhance and modernize existing systems.

Provide guidance and training to team members regarding information systems and relevant tools.


Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

At least 3 years of experience as a System Analyst (experience with hospital systems is an advantage).

Strong expertise in analyzing, designing, and defining end-to-end information systems from both business and technical perspectives.

Solid background in software development and database concepts, with the ability to guide and advise development teams.

Experience in IT project management, driving systems from initiation through implementation and go-live.

Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across multiple teams.

Role Overview

We’re looking for a strong Technical Lead / Backend Engineer to act as a true right-hand to leadership.

This is not a pure management role.
This is not a frontend-heavy position.

We need a hands-on backend expert who can translate high-level direction into structured technical execution — either personally or by coordinating a small team (2–3 developers).

You should be someone who understands that code serves business goals, not the other way around.

What You’ll Do

Translate product direction into technical architecture and execution plans

Build and maintain backend systems and APIs

Review code, guide developers, and unblock technical issues

Work independently once goals are defined

Participate in planning discussions and challenge ideas constructively

Ensure clean, scalable, production-ready implementations

Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, etc.) effectively in daily workflows

Core Requirements (Must Have)

Technical Depth

5+ years of hands-on backend/API development

Strong experience in at least one: Python, PHP, Node.js, Java, or Go

Not frontend-only — real backend architecture experience required

Server & Deployment

Solid Linux knowledge

Comfortable with deployment, environments, troubleshooting

Basic DevOps understanding (not necessarily a DevOps engineer)

AI-Enabled Engineering

Actively uses AI coding assistants in daily work

Open to leveraging AI for speed and quality

Not skeptical or dismissive of AI tooling

Communication

Professional English (written and verbal)

Can explain technical decisions in clear, simple terms

Analytical Thinking

Able to read unfamiliar codebases

Can trace logic flows and debug independently

Identifies issues without needing step-by-step guidance

Business Awareness

Understands the “why” behind features

Thinks in terms of impact, efficiency, and outcomes

Leadership Expectations

Experience coordinating 2–3 developers (remote or in-house)

Reviews code and provides constructive feedback

Makes decisions when needed, but collaborates openly

Voices opinions respectfully and accepts final decisions gracefully

Works autonomously once direction is aligned

Strong Plus

Experience working with distributed/remote teams

Has built or significantly contributed to a product (not just maintenance)

Comfortable with ambiguity and evolving requirements

Documents decisions proactively

Curious, experimental, stays technically current

This Role Is NOT a Fit If

You are frontend-focused without real backend depth

You dismiss AI tools as unnecessary

You haven’t written production code in years

You require detailed specs for everything

You struggle to explain your past technical decisions clearly

You become defensive when challenged

What We Offer

High ownership and real technical influence

Direct collaboration with leadership

A pragmatic, execution-focused environment

Opportunity to shape systems and processes from the ground up

If you’re looking for a role where you can combine strong backend engineering with real product impact — and act as a technical multiplier — we’d love to hear from you.

Job_Title: Tech Lead, Web Core Product & Chrome Extension - Asia
Full_Description:
APPLY THROUGH THIS LINK: https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/speechify

Speechify is a text-to-speech app that makes it easy for the world to access information. 20+ million people use our Google Chrome extension, web app, iOS app, and Android app. our mission is to make sure that reading is never a barrier to learning.

Our amazing users are students, professionals, and productivity lovers. Many of them have learning differences like dyslexia and ADHD, while many just want to read faster and listen on the go. With Speechify you can turn any book, document, or website into audio, and listen while you’re in the car, doing laundry, walking your dog, making dinner, working out, skydiving—whatever your daily routine is! Speechify also powers Medium, the Star Tribune, The Direct, and more. Easily add text-to-speech to your website.

Cliff Weitzman, our fearless CEO, founded Speechify in 2017 in a dorm room at Brown University so he could share with others the incredible text-to-speech software he’d been working on. Cliff has dyslexia and he was frustrated with how much time and energy it took for him to read. Advanced TTS technology was a total gamechanger, it allowed him to finish his readings 3x faster than a normal reader and to better comprehend and retain information.

At Speechify our goal is for reading to never be a barrier to learning for anyone. Nothing should hold you back from learning information quickly and effectively.

Speechify has grown to employ over 100 team members spread out across the globe in just a few short years. We're proud of the incredible team with members who were previously leaders and senior engineers at companies like Snapchat, Apple, Spotify, Amazon & Uber. We all love and prioritise ownership, delivering value with speed, learning as much as we can and making our users feel empowered.

The Role

APPLY THROUGH THIS LINK: https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/speechify/jobs/4658498004

Mission

The mission of Speechify is to make sure that reading is never a barrier to learning.

Over 50 million people use Speechify’s text-to-speech products to turn whatever they’re reading – PDFs, books, Google Docs, news articles, websites – into audio, so they can read faster, read more, and remember more. Speechify’s text-to-speech reading products include its iOS app, Android App, Mac App, Chrome Extension, and Web App. Google recently named Speechify the Chrome Extension of the Year and Apple named Speechify its App of the Day.

Today, nearly 200 people around the globe work on Speechify in a 100% distributed setting – Speechify has no office. These include frontend and backend engineers, AI research scientists, and others from Amazon, Microsoft, and Google, leading PhD programs like Stanford, high growth startups like Stripe, Vercel, Bolt, and many founders of their own companies.

This is a key role and ideal for someone who thinks strategically, enjoys fast-paced environments, passionate about making product decisions, and has experience building great user experiences that delight users.

We are a flat organization that allows anyone to become a leader by showing excellent technical skills and delivering results consistently and fast. Work ethic, solid communication skills, and obsession with winning are paramount. 

Our interview process involves several technical interviews and we aim to complete them within 1 week.

What You’ll Do

Actively ship production code to the web products
Work closely with your dedicated product team
Participate in product discussions to shape the product roadmap
Have the opportunity to work on new and exciting features that will impact millions of lives

What We Offer

A fast-growing environment where you can help shape the culture
An entrepreneurial crew that supports risk, intuition, and hustle
A hands-off approach so you can focus and do your best work
The opportunity to make an impact in a transformative industry
A competitive salary, a collegiate atmosphere, and a commitment to building a
great asynchronous culture

Think you’re a good fit for this job? 

Tell us more about yourself and why you're interested in the role when you apply.

And don’t forget to include links to your portfolio and LinkedIn.

Not looking but know someone who would make a great fit? 

Refer them!

Speechify is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace. 

Speechify does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status.

Ideal Profile

An Ideal Candidate Should Have

Experience. You've built and ship products that have scaled to thousands or millions of users
Customer obsession. You are passionate about the field and have the desire to build high quality product that serves customer needs
Speed. You work quickly to generate ideas and know how to decide which things can ship now and what things need time
Focus. We’re a high-growth startup with a busy, remote team. You know how and when to engage or be heads down
Collaboration. You know how to inspire, play, and negotiate with opinionated designers, marketers, and PMs
Tech Stack: Vanilla JS, ReactJS, Redux, Firebase, Typescript

What's on Offer?

Leadership Role

Senior Consultant - Technology

Do you want to build the next great international consulting firm?

Meksys is driving digital transformation and redefining what’s possible for businesses across the globe.  We are building the backbone that powers tomorrow’s most ambitious companies.

We're looking for a Senior Consultant who brings the strategic depth and client gravitas to match the technical excellence our teams already deliver.

Meksys is built by a rockstar team with 30+ years of international business experience, building and scaling digital applications to millions of users, and building and scaling global operations teams.  This is a rare opportunity to join the next rocketship operating across all continents. 

What You'll Do:

Lead client engagements from discovery through delivery, translating ambiguous business problems into clear, actionable solutions
Act as strategic advisor to client stakeholders - shaping what gets built and why, not just how
Facilitate workshops, design sessions, and executive briefings that drive alignment and decisions
Define solution approaches, working models, and governance patterns in collaboration with engineering and product teams
Bridge client business needs with Meksys delivery teams, ensuring work is grounded in real outcomes
Develop and maintain trusted client relationships that generate long-term partnership and new opportunities
Support business development including RFP responses, proposals, and solution blueprinting
Conduct industry and client research to identify trends, risks, and opportunities for improvement
Produce high-quality strategic deliverables with emphasis on clarity, storytelling, and actionable recommendations
Contribute thought leadership and cross-industry perspective to clients and internally
Coach and mentor junior team members, helping them grow their client and consulting skills.

What You Bring:

5+ years in management consulting, enterprise software, or a client-facing advisory role
Proven ability to run discovery engagements, facilitate stakeholder workshops, and write recommendations that land
Fluency in enterprise application domains (ERP, HRM, workforce management, or similar)
Comfortable navigating both technical and business conversations with credibility
Strong written communication and deliverable quality.  You raise the bar in every document you touch
Track record of building client trust and identifying new opportunities organically.

Back End Staff Software Engineer

Skills - [Scala, Java, Kotlin, C#, Go]

Experience - 8+ years

Experience Requirement:
We are looking for engineers with 8+ years of experience in product-based companies, building and scaling high-traffic, consumer-facing or platform products.
Candidates from pure service/outsourcing environments will not be considered, unless they have significant experience working on core product development or platform engineering.


What You’ll Need to Succeed​

Strong RDBMS knowledge (SQL Server, Oracle, MySQL, or other).​

Ability to direct significant company-wide projects and sets technical vision.​

Good command of the English language.​

Implement advanced CI/CD pipelines and robust testing strategies to ensure seamless integration, deployment, and high code quality.​

Passion for software development and continuous improvement of your knowledge and skills.​

Knowledge in NoSQL, Queueing systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ, ActiveMQ, MSMQ), and Play framework.​

Job_Title: Asset Manager, Datacenter Infrastructure and Services
Full_Description:
Responsibilities

Our Data Center Infrastructure & Services team supports the company's fast growing DC Asset Management foot prints, by managing datacenter assets and logistics. Our mission is to build resilient, integrated, innovative global Asset Management solutions and enable our customers to grow and scale. The Data Center Infrastructure & Services team is looking for an Asset Manager who will manage the inbound and outbound logistics into Data Centers, overseeing asset storage operations, supporting asset management activities such as cycle count, and supporting decommission related operations.

The ideal candidate we're looking for would be a customer-focused, result-driven leader who can stay resilient against challenges or stress, apply best practices and judgements, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and yet be hands-on with tactical tasks. Responsibilities:

Managing the data center asset lifecycle: covering the entire process from receiving to retirement for all core IDC equipment including racks, rPDU, servers, networks (switches/OTNs/optics/AOC/etc), cables, cooling liquid, etc.
Oversee daily operations, develop operational frameworks, monitor metrics & KPI, and establish operational guidelines, including inbound and outbound asset management, cycle count, RMA, relocation, decommission, inventory management, etc.

Job_Title: Software Engineer Intern (Teradyne, Pathum Thani, Thailand)
Full_Description:
Work Location: Pathum Thani, Thailand 

Our Purpose
TERADYNE, where experience meets innovation and driving excellence in every connection. We are fueled by creativity and diversity of thought and in our workforce. Our employees are supported to innovate and learn something new every day.

We cultivate a culture of inclusion for all employees that respects their individual strengths, views, and experiences. We believe that our differences enable us to be a better team – one that makes better decisions, drives innovation and delivers better business results.

Opportunity Overview
The intern will design and develop a web-based inventory management system to digitalize and automate spare part tracking across Teradyne test system (e.g., HDD Testers and ATE platforms). The system will manage multiple inventory states (Good, Defective, On Order), support transactional workflows, and provide real-time visibility through dashboards and reports. This project involves full-stack development, data modeling, and business logic implementation based on an engineering workflow (flow chart provided).

Key Responsibilities

Core System Development
Develop a transaction-based inventory system to support:
Book In / Book Out
Verification In / Out
Defective In / Out
Scrap and Repair flows
Implement inventory state management:
Good Inventory on Hand
Defective Inventory on Hand
Inventory On Order
Build calculation logic for real-time inventory updates
Application Features
Design and implement:
Web-based UI for transaction input and tracking
Inventory dashboards and summary reports
Search and filtering for parts and transactions
Support tracking of:
Good parts lifecycle
Defective parts lifecycle
Verification workflow (inspection queue)
Implement inventory formulas, such as:
Inventory On Hand
Inventory On Order
Defective Aging (for SN-based parts) ￼
System Design & Engineering
Design database schema for:
Parts
Transactions
Inventory states
Implement:
Role-based access control (e.g., clerk, supervisor, manager)
Audit trail (who did what, when)
Develop basic REST APIs for future integration (e.g., ERP/SAP)
Documentation & Deployment
Document:
System architecture
Data model and APIs
Prepare:
User guide for administrator users
Source code and technical documentation
Support deployment to:
Staging environment
Production (internal use)

Technical Stack

Frontend: React / simple web UI
Backend: C# (.NET)
Database: SQL (or approved internal alternative)
Optional: SharePoint integration (if required),Power BI / dashboard tools
 

All About You
We seek individuals who share our passion and determination. Our commitment to customer success drives us to go the extra mile. If you’re ready to join us in this mission, take a closer look at the minimum criteria for the position.

Currently pursuing a bachelor’s degree in computer engineering / software engineering
Basic programming knowledge (any of the following) : C#, JavaScript , Understanding of Basic web development (frontend/backend concepts), Data structure and logic design

Expected Deliverables

By the end of the internship, the intern should:
Deliver a working web-based inventory system
Support core transaction flows and inventory calculations
Provide basic dashboard/reporting capability
Submit documentation and code for handover

We are only considering candidates local to position location and are unable to provide relocation for this position

This position is not eligible for visa sponsorship

Greenmoons ก่อตั้งในปี 2022 โดยเริ่มจากการเป็นบริษัทสตาร์ทอัพด้านเทคโนโลยีที่เกิดจากประสบการณ์ที่สั่งสมมานานนับสิบปี เราเริ่มจากการเป็นทีมงานเล็ก ๆ ที่หลงใหลและมือหนึ่งในด้านเทคโนโลยีระดับประเทศ พวกเรานำความสามารถและวิสัยทัศน์ร่วมกันเพื่อสร้างนวัตกรรมที่จะช่วยให้คู่ค้าและลูกค้าของเราฝ่าฝันความท้าทายในโลกดิจิตัลไปได้ เรา มองเทคโนโลยีคือพลังสู่การเปลี่ยนแปลง เรามุ่งมั่นสร้างอะไรใหม่ ๆ พัฒนาไปพร้อมกับคู่ค้าและลูกค้า  และคอยให้คำปรึกษาเพื่อเอาชนะความท้าทายไปด้วยกัน 

ชื่อ Greenmoons เองก็สื่อถึงพันธกิจหลักของเรา คือส่งเสริมการเติบโตและความก้าวหน้าด้วยนวัตกรรม Green (สีเขียว) ของแบรนด์หมายถึงความทุ่มเทที่มั่นคงเพื่อให้บริษัทของคู่ค้าและลูกค้าประสบความสำเร็จอย่างสูงสุดและยั่งยืน  Moons (พระจันทร์) แทนความเป็นไปได้อันไรขีดจำกัด

เราคือบริษัทที่ก่อตั้งโดยคนไทย เราทุ่มเทเพื่อนำความเปลี่ยนแปลงธุรกิจทุกขนาดในทุกภาคส่วนสู่ระบบดิจิทัล ตั้งแต่ ERP software จนถึง Robotic Process Automation (RPA), AI Automation, E-commerce solutions, Web & Super App Development, และ Educational Technology 

ลักษณะงาน

พัฒนาและบํารุงรักษาแอปพลิเคชัน Android โดยใช้ Kotlin โดยปฏิบัติตามแนวทางปฏิบัติที่ดีที่สุดและหลักเกณฑ์ของ Apple
ทํางานร่วมกับนักออกแบบ ผู้จัดการผลิตภัณฑ์ ผู้ทดสอบ QA และสมาชิกในทีมคนอื่นๆ เพื่อทําความเข้าใจข้อกําหนดของโครงการและส่งมอบผลิตภัณฑ์ในเวลาที่เหมาะสม
ทํางานในวงจรชีวิตการพัฒนาแอปทั้งหมด รวมถึงการพัฒนา การทดสอบ การปรับใช้ และการบํารุงรักษา
ผสานรวมกับ RESTful API และบริการเว็บ เพื่อให้มั่นใจถึงความปลอดภัยและประสิทธิภาพของข้อมูล
ดําเนินการตรวจสอบโค้ดและมีส่วนร่วมในวัฒนธรรมคุณภาพของโค้ดและแนวทางปฏิบัติที่ดีที่สุด
เพิ่มประสิทธิภาพแอป การตอบสนอง และการจัดการหน่วยความจํา
ติดตามข่าวสารล่าสุดเกี่ยวกับแนวโน้มการพัฒนา Android และเทคโนโลยีใหม่ ๆ เพื่อเสนอการปรับปรุงและการปรับปรุง
ทํางานร่วมกับทีมเพื่อประเมินระยะเวลาของโครงการเพื่อให้ตรงตามกําหนดเวลา

คุณสมบัติ

มีประสบการณ์จริงอย่างน้อย 2 ปีในการพัฒนา iOS แบบเนทีฟ
ความเชี่ยวชาญในภาษาการเขียนโปรแกรม Swift
ความเข้าใจอย่างถ่องแท้เกี่ยวกับระบบนิเวศ iOS และสถาปัตยกรรมแอปพลิเคชัน (เช่น MVC, MVVM, สถาปัตยกรรมที่สะอาด)
ความคุ้นเคยกับ RESTful API และการรวมบริการเว็บโดยใช้เฟรมเวิร์กเช่น Alamofire
ความเข้าใจเกี่ยวกับวิธีการทดสอบแอปบนอุปกรณ์เคลื่อนที่ รวมถึงการทดสอบหน่วยและการทดสอบ UI จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ
มีประสบการณ์กับ SwiftUI Compose จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ
มีประสบการณ์เกี่ยวกับระบบควบคุมเวอร์ชัน (เช่น Git)
ทักษะการแก้ปัญหาที่แข็งแกร่งและความหลงใหลในการสร้างแอปพลิเคชันมือถือคุณภาพสูง
ทักษะการทํางานเป็นทีมและการสื่อสารที่ยอดเยี่ยม
มีแรงจูงใจในตนเองและสามารถทํางานได้อย่างอิสระหรือเป็นส่วนหนึ่งของทีม

Job_Title: CS – Cloud & AI Security Architect Engineer
Company: Advanced Info Service Public Company Limited (AIS)
Full_Description:
Job overview

Develop planning strategies & design a master plan and roadmap of cyber security architecture. More focusing on the secure design, deployment, and governance of our multi-cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and emerging AI/ML platforms. This is a "hands-on architect" role. You will define the security guardrails that allow our developers to innovate at speed without compromising data sovereignty or exposing us to "Prompt Injection" or "Data Leakage" in AI models.




Role & Responsibility

• Cloud Security Architecture:

Design and implement Zero Trust architectures across multi-cloud and hybrid environments.

Lead implements the Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) and Cloud Workload Protection (CWPP) strategy to ensure 100% visibility into "Shadow IT."

Automate security policy as code (IaC) within CI/CD pipelines (Terraform, CloudFormation).


• AI/ML Security:

Cyber Security & Compliance: ควบคุมดูแลความปลอดภัยทางไซเบอร์ (Firewall/Endpoint) และกำหนดนโยบาย IT ให้สอดคล้องกับกฎหมาย พรบ.คอมพิวเตอร์ และ PDPA

Digital Asset Administration: บริหารจัดการสินทรัพย์ดิจิทัลทั้งหมดขององค์กร ตั้งแต่ระบบ Cloud Admin (M365/Google), Domain, Hosting ไปจนถึง Mail Server

Business Model Analysis: ประยุกต์ใช้ความรู้ด้านบัญชีเบื้องต้นและเศรษฐศาสตร์ในการวิเคราะห์ Model ธุรกิจ เพื่อให้ระบบ IT สนับสนุนผลกำไรและการเติบโตขององค์กร

Project & Budget Control: วางแผนงบประมาณ IT ควบคุมการดำเนินงานโครงการต่างๆ และทำหน้าที่เป็นที่ปรึกษาด้านเทคโนโลยี (IT Consultant) ให้กับทุกแผนก

Leadership & Team Building: มีวุฒิภาวะผู้นำสูง สามารถบริหารจัดการทีมงานภายใต้แรงกดดัน และพร้อมถ่ายทอดองค์ความรู้เพื่อพัฒนาศักยภาพบุคลากรในทีม

JOB SUMMARY:

Responsible for supporting new products and mass production of automation machines. Provide new technology and solutions for machine vision, AOI and any related to AOI and image processing.  Find out solution for any root cause of problem and discussion with team. Improve machines to maximize capability per KPI’s commitment plan and cost saving.

 

RESPONSIBILITIES:

Machine vision new software and hardware technology study.

Develop and provide solutions for AOI or machine vision task including software and hardware.

Feasibility test for AOI or machine vision task including software and hardware.

Create drawing and concept design for AOI or machine vision solution.

Machine setup and process adjustments. Connecting and communication with machine.

Setup spare part, calibration, and repair equipment to support H-line and Clean Line Machines.

Training new engineers and technicians to push problem solving skills closer to the operation.

Coordinate with related departments for any improvement projects


QUALIFICATIONS:

Education Required: Bachelor or higher in any engineering filed or relates.


Skill Required:                  

Communication skill, English command.

Ability to write and assemble technical reports.

Knowledge of Microsoft office, electronic system, test bench setup skills.

Statistical analysis skills (SPC, Six sigma, Lean manufacturing)

Visual Basic, C#, PLC, Visio.


Experience: 5-8 years.

•ตําแหน่ง: IT Support for MES

•สถานทีปฏิบัติงาน: อําเภอปลวกแดง, จังหวัดระยอง (ประจําที LG Electronics)

•เงินเดือน: 20,000 – 30,000 บาท/เดือน (พิจารณาตามประสบการณ์)

•รูปแบบการจ้างงาน: พนักงานประจํา (Full-time)

💻 หน้าทีความรับผิดชอบหลัก (Key Responsibilities)

•MES Support (การสนับสนุนระบบ MES): เปนจุดติดต่อแรกสําหรับแก้ไขปญหาทีเกียวข้องกับระบบปฏิบัติการการผลิต (Manufacturing Execution System -

MES) ในสายการผลิต

•On-site Troubleshooting (การแก้ไขปญหาหน้างาน): ติดตัง กําหนดค่า และแก้ไขปญหาฮาร์ดแวร์และซอฟต์แวร์ IT ในพืนทีการผลิต เช่น PC, เครืองสแกนบาร์

โค้ด, เครืองพิมพ์ฉลาก และการเชือมต่อเครือข่ายเบืองต้น

•Helpdesk & User Support (การสนับสนุนผู้ใช้งาน): รับเรืองและตอบสนองต่อปญหาด้าน IT จากพนักงานฝายผลิต พร้อมให้การแก้ไขอย่างรวดเร็วเพือลดเวลา

หยุดชะงักของการทํางาน

•Issue Escalation (การส่งต่อปญหา): ตรวจสอบข้อผิดพลาดของระบบ วิเคราะห์ปญหาในเบืองต้น และส่งต่อปญหาทางเทคนิคทีซับซ้อนไปยังทีมพัฒนาระบบ

หรือทีมบํารุงรักษา

•System Administration (การจัดการระบบ): จัดการบัญชีผู้ใช้งาน สิทธิการเข้าถึงระบบ และช่วยเหลือในการลงทะเบียนข้อมูลหลัก (Master Data) เบืองต้น

🎁 สวัสดิการ (Benefits & Perks)

•มีรถบัสรับ-ส่งพนักงาน

•อาหารฟรี (ในช่วงเวลาทํางาน)




Qualifications

1. การศึกษา: วุฒิปริญญาตรี หรือ ปวส. ในสาขาวิทยาการคอมพิวเตอร์ เทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ หรือสาขาทีเกียวข้อง

2. ภาษา: มีทักษะการสือสารภาษาอังกฤษเบืองต้น (สามารถอ่านคู่มือทางเทคนิคและสือสารปญหาพืนฐานได้)

3. ทักษะทางเทคนิค: มีความเข้าใจในเรืองฮาร์ดแวร์ PC, การแก้ไขปญหา Windows OS และการตังค่าเครือข่ายพืนฐานเปนอย่างดี

4. สถานที: ยินดีและสามารถเดินทางมาปฏิบัติงานที อําเภอปลวกแดง จังหวัดระยอง ได้

5. หากมีประสบการณ์การทํางานด้าน IT Support, Helpdesk หรือทํางานในสภาพแวดล้อมโรงงานอุตสาหกรรมจะพิจารณาเปนพิเศษ

6. คุ้นเคยกับระบบการผลิต เช่น MES หรือ ERP

7. มีความกระตือรือร้น มีทักษะในการแก้ปญหา และมีมนุษยสัมพันธ์ทีดี

Nipa Cloud is the #1 OpenStack public cloud provider in Thailand.

We have our own data center and develop our software platform called “Nipa Cloud Platform (NCP)”. NCP is built based on an opensource software called OpenStack and serve as NIPA Public Cloud. We can also utilize NCP to build a private cloud platform for client organizations.

Our mission is to help our clients grow and advance forward with us. We are always looking for people with the passion to make an impact in the digital transformation era. 

Cloud Solution: https://www.nipa.cloud/; https://th-th.facebook.com/nipacloud/ 

As Cloud Solutions Sale you will:

Become an expert on our cloud product/solutions offerings.

Meet with customers online or in person to deliver presentation on cloud solutions that meet the
customer’s needs.

Maintain and establish good business relationships with potential clients.

Achieve personal monthly sales target and other goals set by Sales Manager.

Contact leads provided by the company (inbound leads).

Research potential leads from business directories, web searches, government databases, or digital resources (outbound leads).

Create and provide service proposals per clients’ needs in collaboration with Presales and Infrastructure team.

Enter required data for tracking customer cases on CRM system.

Answer potential customer questions both during presentations and for follow-up calls.

**For the senior-level position, you should be able to lead and develop/suggest sales solutions to achieve the team’s goals. 
 


Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administrative, Marketing, OR Computer Engineering, Computer Science, IT, Business Computer or related field.

Atleast 1-5 years of experience in technology-related, business management, sales or consulting is required.

*Experience in cloud computing technologies, network/system or data center highly preferred.

*Proven track record of achieving sales targets.

Good interpersonal, self-management and professional/effective communication.

Both a highly motivated independent self-starter and a supportive team player. 

Proficient in Microsoft Office programs (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)

Job_Title: TDI - Head of Branch Technology - VP
Full_Description:
Job Description:

Details of the Division and Team:

A person who will be the local representative of TDI organization oversees the local branch technology team in providing multiple aspects of onshore technology services covering application support, infrastructure, end-user technologies, and cybersecurity whilst maintaining strong control over risk and regulatory portfolio and financial performance of the department.

What we will offer you: 

A healthy, engaged and well-supported workforce is better equipped to do their best work and, more importantly, enjoy their lives inside and outside the workplace. That’s why we are committed to providing an environment with your development and wellbeing at its center.

You can expect:

Corporate Group Insurance – premium borne by company

Provident Fund Scheme – employer & employee contributions

Annual health checkup – cost borne by company (once a year; conditions apply)

Flexible Work Arrangements – various ways to work, to fit employees’ needs         

EAP – free and confidential counseling, online work-life resources

Employee networks – Diversity, volunteering, - various activities to participate 

Primary caregiver & non primary caregiver leave – more than statutory requirement                                                                                                         

Your key responsibilities:

Strategic Vision:

Be accountable for the provision of TDI technology roadmap and strategy in DB Thailand within agreed timeline and budget.

Partnering with local stakeholders to align the business strategy and growth plan with available Technology services.

Alignment with local regulators and other applicable Self-Regulated Organizations to anticipate any new regulations and its impacts to DB Thailand.

Infrastructure & Operations:

Ensure the stability of technology availability covering local infrastructure, network, applications, and End-User experience are in-line with TDI latest risk and control standards.

Capacity and life-cycle monitoring for all IT assets including budget planning for tech-refresh and decommissioning.

Manager and leadership:

Inspire, supervise, and oversee the development of Thailand Branch Technology team.

Setting the SMART priorities (goals and objectives) for each Thailand Branch Technology team member.

Actively contribute and participate in APAC BT community as well as with local stakeholders through local forum i.e., exco, OOF, IT Steering Committee, outsourcing committee, etc.

Ensure all team members complete their mandatory and/or certification training.

Vendor & Partner Management:

Ensure all local Technology 3rd party vendors are onboarded to DB Group Third Party Risk Management system and complete all regular assessment timely.

Manage invoices from local technology vendors to ensure costs are aligned with budget. Any ad-hoc or anomaly cost is to be coordinated with BT group COO-Finance.

Cybersecurity & Risk Management:

Partner with the CISO to enforce Zero-Trust models and ensure compliance with standards from DB Group, international bodies, and local banking regulations.

Develop, maintain, and test robust Disaster Recover (DR) and Business Continuity Plans (BCP).

Your skills and experience:

Education: Bachelor’s, or master’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or MBA with a focus on Tech Management.

Certification: All applicable IT & Risk Management certification from Thailand regulator.

Language: English; Speak / Write Fluently.

Professional Experience:

Tenure: 15+ years in IT, with at least 5–8 years in a senior leadership role (VP, CTO, or Head of IT) specifically within the Banking or Financial Services sector, and preferably international institutions.

Exposure to multiple teams in separate locations / countries.

A solid understanding of technology in an enterprise context, spanning; infrastructure, end user and application services, cloud hosting, and AI.

Excellent communication and influencing skills with senior stakeholders from both business and regional/global technology functions.

Manage teams; develop and build high performing teams.

IT Strategy and current industry trends.

Software delivery practices.

Data Management

Solid knowledge of Thailand banking regulations with respect to IT Services

Exposure to Thailand banking IT forums

IT Change and Transformation delivery

IT service management

Operational Risk Management and Cyber-Threats.

How we’ll support you:  

Flexible working to assist you balance your personal priorities

Coaching and support from experts in your team

A culture of continuous learning to aid progression

A range of flexible benefits that you can tailor to suit your needs

Training and development to help you excel in your career

About us and our teams:

Deutsche Bank is the leading German bank with strong European roots and a global network. click here  to see what we do.

Deutsche Bank & Diversity

We strive for a culture in which we are empowered to excel together every day. This includes acting responsibly, thinking commercially, taking initiative and working collaboratively.

Together we share and celebrate the successes of our people. Together we are Deutsche Bank Group.

We welcome applications from all people and promote a positive, fair and inclusive work environment.
